reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.8.8: PNG export now verifies the file is a genuinely decodable PNG before AND after writing to disk, and reads the file back to confirm it matches. If a cloud-sync client or antivirus alters the file, or the encode is faulty, the export fails honestly with a clear message instead of leaving an unopenable file. Library-stored flattened assets are verified the same way. The status line now shows the full export path.
